case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,295.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY V ROY LEFCOURT ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT ANTOINETTE PAILLETT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $400.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY & ALL INTERESTED PARTIES & BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,695.OO U.S.CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY CLAIMANT PAILLETT, ANTOINETTE
